message:
perf: disable gas metering to fix 51x performance regression

Gas metering instrumentation was adding counter checks to every basic
block in WASM, causing massive overhead for compute-heavy code:
- Before: fib(45) ~28,000ms
- After: fib(45) ~11,582ms (2x faster than Bun)

Changes:
- Disable instrumentForGasMetering() in build pipeline
- Enable AOT opt_level=3 (was blocked by gas metering crashes)
- Improve frozen_init_c injection in compiled bytecode

Performance comparison (fib benchmarks):
| Runtime     | fib(40) | fib(45) |
|-------------|---------|---------|
| Native C    | 344ms   | 3,683ms |
| EdgeBox AOT | 654ms   | 11,582ms|
| Bun         | 1,765ms | 23,294ms|

EdgeBox frozen functions now achieve ~2x speedup over Bun.
